trim: Gasoline trims; VIN test anchor is RST
engine: Gasoline engines covered by the 2021 Silverado 1500 Owner's Manual; Duramax diesel supplement excluded

maintenance.service: Rotate tires and perform required services

interval.logic: Every 7,500 miles; check oil level and oil life percentage, change engine oil and filter if needed

maintenance.notes: The manual states the Tire Rotation and Required Services are recommended every 12,000 km/7,500 mi. Oil change timing remains Oil Life System driven, with at least one oil/filter change per year.

interval.logic: Engine Oil Life System; change within 600 miles of CHANGE ENGINE OIL SOON, and at least once per year

maintenance.notes: If the oil life system is accidentally reset, service within 3,000 miles since the last service.

maintenance.service: Check engine air filter life and replace if needed

interval.logic: At required service intervals; follow engine air filter life percentage/status where equipped

maintenance.notes: If not equipped with engine air filter life system, inspect the engine air cleaner filter. Footnote says replacement is also every four years, whichever comes first; dusty use requires more frequent inspection.

interval.logic: Every 22,500 miles or two years, whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Manual table repeats this item at 22,500-mile intervals. Heavy traffic, poor air quality, high dust, reduced airflow, fogging, or odors may require earlier replacement.

interval.logic: Every 45,000 miles in the Additional Required Services tables

maintenance.notes: Visually check fuel and vapor lines and hoses for attachment, connection, routing, and condition.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs and inspect spark plug wires or boots except 2.7L L4 Turbo

interval.logic: Every 97,500 miles for engines except 2.7L L4 Turbo

maintenance.notes: Do not apply this interval to the 2.7L L4 Turbo engine.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs and inspect spark plug wires or boots for 2.7L L4 Turbo
maintenance.notes: Manual table shows 2.7L L4 Turbo spark plug service at 60,000-mile intervals.
Do not directly power wash transfer case or axle output seals; contaminated fluid should be replaced.

maintenance.service: Change automatic transmission fluid and filter

interval.logic: Severe schedule only; repeats at 45,000-mile intervals

maintenance.notes: Shown in the severe schedule at 45,000, 90,000, and 135,000 miles. Not listed as a normal-use fixed interval in the extracted normal table.

interval.logic: Severe schedule only; 4WD only; repeats at 45,000-mile intervals

maintenance.notes: Shown in the severe schedule at 45,000, 90,000, and 135,000 miles.

maintenance.service: Drain and fill engine cooling system

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles or five years, whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Manual footnote refers to Cooling System section.

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles or 10 years, whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Inspect for fraying, excessive cracking, or damage; replace if needed.
Time-based service from maintenance table footnote.

interval.logic: Every 15,000 miles or 12 months, whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Manual table repeats this item at 15,000-mile intervals.

maintenance.service: Replace hood gas struts and tailgate dampener

interval.logic: Every 75,000 miles or 10 years, whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Manual table shows this item at 75,000 and 150,000 miles.
Manual says this service can be complex; see dealer.

applicability: VIN test target is 2021 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 RST
Diesel engine maintenance is excluded and belongs to the Duramax diesel supplement
Severe schedule applies to heavy city traffic in hot weather, hilly or mountainous terrain, frequent trailer towing, high speed or competitive driving, or taxi/police/delivery service
validation_flags: Candidate built from Chevrolet's official 2021 Silverado 1500 Owner's Manual PDF.
Text/table extraction checked Service and Maintenance pages 408-415; rendered-page verification remains required before production.
Claude draft was used only as an advisory checklist; unsupported normal transmission/transfer-case intervals were not copied.
Manual identifies the smaller gasoline engine as 2.7L L4 Turbo; do not use later TurboMax naming without source support.
Automatic transmission fluid and filter appears in the severe table at 45,000-mile intervals, not as a normal fixed interval in the extracted normal table.
Oil change timing is Oil Life System driven and must not be reduced to a simple fixed-mile interval.
